description: Multiple incidents of nuisance RCD tripping in block B. Opening a problem record to find the underlying fault (suspected moisture ingress in an external circuit).
short_description: Recurring RCD trips — Salthill Court block B

description: Repeated lighting outages across two retail units point to a shared circuit fault rather than individual fittings. Investigating root cause.
The communal EV charger bank keeps dropping offline. Tracking whether it's a supply, networking or unit firmware issue.
Kitchen breaker trips under combined load at peak service. Problem record to determine whether it's load balancing or a faulty appliance.
short_description: Café — breaker nuisance tripping under load
